findings: Multiple bulk-related backward and forward traffic features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and cardinality ratios near zero, indicating near-constant values across the partition.
Local consistency verification on selected features found no evidence of intra-class variation or temporal dynamics within the bounded neighborhoods.
The low diversity bulk features are structurally stable and lack temporal variation within the analyzed partition.
limitations: Analysis limited to bounded local neighborhoods and selected features; broader temporal dynamics outside partition scope not assessed.
